event: Parisian boulevard scene on a rainy autumn day
description: A bustling Parisian boulevard scene rendered with quick, fluid brushwork. Pedestrians in dark coats walk along wet sidewalks, horse-drawn carriages move through the center of the road, and leafy autumn trees line the left side, their foliage catching warm tones of gold and amber. Grand Haussmann-style buildings with pale stone facades stretch along the right side, their arcades and upper stories receding into atmospheric haze. Gas lamps and a kiosk punctuate the streetscape.
